items.title: [正面] This game is genuinely a gem if you're a fan of Sl...
items.summary: This game is genuinely a gem if you're a fan of Slay the spire, Chrono ark and limbus company you'll enjoy this game. The story is fantastic and mature, the game-play is extremely addictive and there's a surprising amount of high skill expression and for a gacha game this one is very generous and not predatory. The community is also surprisingly welcoming and are very helpful. I'm honestly glad I gave this game a shot because I'm all in now and I'm here to stay. My only problems with this game mainly stem from the translation issues but because the devs are low-key poor I give them a pass.

items.title: [正面] To think I would be playing a chinese game and a g...
items.summary:
To think I would be playing a chinese game and a gacha of all things but here I am discovering this gem and playing for quite some time now. Up until this moment I wasn't very clear on whether I was really liking the game but somehow I kept playing it daily and even spent some extra time climbing up the ladder in PvP which is its own game for some reason but it's a good thing. Now I'm fairly certain of its potential and really hope some more people would find it just as I did because it TRULY deserves this recognition so I'm leaving this review to boost its popularity.

Anyway, the game is awesome and has some really good mature themes but the story is quite wacky at the end leaving me like "well that escalated quickly". It's a gacha game for card game enjoyers especially if you enjoy some bizarre things you wouldn't see in any other media of its genre.

items.title: [正面] Pretty good story so far.  Really like the art sty...
items.summary: Pretty good story so far.  Really like the art style and soundtracks. Cons: Minor translation errors.

items.title: [正面] Been having a blast with project. Graphics are cha...
items.summary: Been having a blast with project. Graphics are charming and gameplay loop is surprisingly addictive. It’s a fun and engaging experience that is well worth my time. Absolutely recommend checking project out!

items.title: [正面] cthulhu slay the spire with some sick art? sign me...
items.summary: cthulhu slay the spire with some sick art? sign me the ♥♥♥♥ up, idk how i didn't stumble upon this gem before, hopefully the devs manage to get some good marketing and translation going, game has some crazy potential and i'd love to see where it goes. EDIT: a good 80% of the translation is human made now and the game keeps getting more and more QOL.

items.title: [正面] I started playing this game a week ago and its a b...
items.summary:
I started playing this game a week ago and its a blast!

It feels like slay the spire/ chrono arc but with a wider roster, a beautiful anime inspired/ mythos art style, and a lot of gameplay depth. It is technically a gacha game, but it is VERY free to play friendly and also has far superior gameplay compared to the autoplay empty husk of a game found in most gachas. If you like the games listed above, I recommend. A great game and story you can play totally free. 

One note: The english is ongoing a dub to be more concise from professional translators, but it is very serviceable as is.

items.title: [正面] if youre a fan of slay the spire and turn based ro...
items.summary: if youre a fan of slay the spire and turn based rogue lite combat you owe it to youreself to give this game a shot, even though its a gacha if youre tactically savvy enough you can overcome any battle with only moderate character investment, the gameplay strategy the game offers has genuine depth to it, which I havent seen to this degree of any other gacha game
